inputs.label: Joist Width
inputs.businessContext: Actual width of the joist in inches (e.g., 1.5 for a nominal 2x).

businessContext_i18n.en: Actual width of the joist in inches (e.g., 1.5 for a nominal 2x).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kirişin inç cinsinden gerçek genişliği (örneğin, nominal 2x için 1,5).
businessContext_i18n.de: Tatsächliche Breite des Balkens in Zoll (z. B. 1,5 für ein Nennmaß 2x).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Largeur réelle de la solive en pouces (par exemple, 1,5 pour un 2x nominal).
businessContext_i18n.es: Ancho real del vigueta en pulgadas (p. ej., 1.5 para un nominal 2x).
businessContext_i18n.ar: العرض الفعلي للرافعة بالبوصة (مثل 1.5 للخشب الاسمي 2×).

inputs.label: Joist Depth
inputs.businessContext: Actual depth of the joist in inches (e.g., 9.25 for a nominal 2x10).

businessContext_i18n.en: Actual depth of the joist in inches (e.g., 9.25 for a nominal 2x10).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kirişin inç cinsinden gerçek yüksekliği (örneğin, nominal 2x10 için 9,25).
businessContext_i18n.de: Tatsächliche Höhe des Balkens in Zoll (z. B. 9,25 für ein Nennmaß 2x10).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur réelle de la solive en pouces (par exemple, 9,25 pour un 2x10 nominal).
businessContext_i18n.es: Peralte real del vigueta en pulgadas (p. ej., 9.25 para un nominal 2x10).
businessContext_i18n.ar: العمق الفعلي للرافعة بالبوصة (مثل 9.25 للخشب الاسمي 2×10).

inputs.label: Joist Spacing
inputs.businessContext: Center-to-center spacing between joists in inches.

businessContext_i18n.en: Center-to-center spacing between joists in inches.
businessContext_i18n.de: Achsabstand zwischen den Balken in Zoll.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Entraxe entre les solives en pouces.
businessContext_i18n.es: Separación centro a centro entre viguetas en pulgadas.

inputs.label: Live Load
inputs.businessContext: Design live load in pounds per square foot (e.g., residential floor = 40 psf).

businessContext_i18n.en: Design live load in pounds per square foot (e.g., residential floor = 40 psf).
businessContext_i18n.de: Bemessungs-Nutzlast in Pfund pro Quadratfuß (z. B. Wohnboden = 40 psf).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Charge d'exploitation de conception en livres par pied carré (par exemple, plancher résidentiel = 40 psf).
businessContext_i18n.es: Carga viva de diseño en libras por pie cuadrado (p. ej., piso residencial = 40 psf).
businessContext_i18n.ar: الحمل الحي التصميمي بالباوند لكل قدم مربع (مثل الأرضية السكنية = 40 رطل/قدم²).

inputs.label: Dead Load
inputs.businessContext: Superimposed dead load in pounds per square foot (e.g., flooring, ceiling = 10 psf).

businessContext_i18n.en: Superimposed dead load in pounds per square foot (e.g., flooring, ceiling = 10 psf).
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzliche ständige Last in Pfund pro Quadratfuß (z. B. Bodenbelag, Decke = 10 psf).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Charge permanente supplémentaire en livres par pied carré (par exemple, revêtement de sol, plafond = 10 psf).
businessContext_i18n.es: Carga muerta superpuesta en libras por pie cuadrado (p. ej., piso, techo = 10 psf).
businessContext_i18n.ar: الحمل الميت الإضافي بالباوند لكل قدم مربع (مثل الأرضيات والأسقف = 10 رطل/قدم²).

inputs.label: Bending Design Value (Fb)
inputs.businessContext: Allowable bending stress for the lumber species and grade (e.g., #2 Douglas Fir-Larch = 900-1000 psi).

businessContext_i18n.en: Allowable bending stress for the lumber species and grade (e.g., #2 Douglas Fir-Larch = 900-1000 psi).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kereste türü ve kalitesi için izin verilen eğilme gerilmesi (örneğin, #2 Douglas Göknarı-Karaçam = 900-1000 psi).
businessContext_i18n.de: Zulässige Biegespannung für die Holzart und -güte (z. B. #2 Douglasie-Lärche = 900-1000 psi).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Contrainte de flexion admissible pour l'essence et la qualité du bois (par exemple, #2 Douglas Mélèze = 900-1000 psi).
businessContext_i18n.es: Esfuerzo admisible a flexión para la especie y grado de madera (p. ej., #2 Douglas Fir-Larch = 900-1000 psi).
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجهاد الانحناء المسموح به لنوع الخشب ودرجته (مثل خشب دوغلاس التنوب رقم 2 = 900-1000 رطل/بوصة²).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
